title: Sybau Insight
description: Clean, simple, and target-locked armor HUD.
body:
**Most of you use CIT Resewn to see the durability of armor, and you can't use it in versions like 1.21.1> 1.21.11, but with this mod, you can see the durability of enemies in versions where it's not allowed. Some may call this cheating, but I don't think it counts as cheating, though there are certainly servers that consider it cheating.


you can change corner pozition with f4 button

_**Currently not compatible with the mod menu my first mod sorry about that.**_
